creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
Any news about this problem? I have not seen any similar report...

May be you could also provide the output of `pkg info perl5'
and a script of a truss output:

script /tmp/urxvt.out
truss /usr/local/bin/urxvt -letsp -1 -pe digital-clock,tabbed &
[some activity in urxvt]
^D
bzip2 -9 /tmp/urxvt.out
